headline: DuPont (DD) Enacts 1 For 3 Reverse Split And Joins Russell Defensive Indices
summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) enacted a 1-for-3 reverse stock split, consolidating every three existing shares into one new share. The company was added to the Russell 1000 Defensive and Russell 1000 Value-Defensive Indices. For investors watching DuPont de Nemours, these moves arrive alongside a share price of $138.47 and substantial longer term returns, including 54.1% over the past year and 67.6% over three years. The reverse split changes the share count and per share price, while index...
